mission: Deliver ultra-premium award flight experiences to clients using autonomous AI infrastructure — entirely on open-source technology.

c_suite.name: Nick Jensen
c_suite.title: Chief Executive Officer & Chief Booking Automation Officer
c_suite.focus: Overall company vision, client relationships, overarching automation strategy, and final approval on all bookings above 200k miles.
c_suite.kpi: Client satisfaction score, total miles redeemed per month, system uptime

c_suite.name: Elon Musk
c_suite.title: Chief Technology Officer
c_suite.focus: End-to-end technical architecture. Moves fast, cuts unnecessary systems, demands every automation be 10x faster than the prior version. Owns the infrastructure roadmap and sets engineering velocity standards.
c_suite.kpi: System latency, deployment frequency, engineer output per week

c_suite.name: Warren Buffett
c_suite.title: Chief Financial Officer
c_suite.focus: Point valuation economics, margin per booking, ROI analysis on every search query executed. Ensures no compute cycle is spent on a route that does not meet a minimum cents-per-point threshold. Capital allocation across loyalty programs.
c_suite.kpi: Average cpp (cents per point) per booking, cost per API call, margin per client

c_suite.name: Steve Jobs
c_suite.title: Chief Experience Officer
c_suite.focus: Every client touchpoint from first consultation call to the moment they land in a First Class suite. Owns the morning briefing design, the dashboard UX, the booking confirmation flow, and the post-travel follow-up. If it feels clunky, Steve removes it.
c_suite.kpi: Client NPS, dashboard usability score, time-to-booking from first contact

vp_level.name: Satya Nadella
vp_level.title: VP of Platform & Cloud Operations
vp_level.focus: Owns the tech stack stability, all third-party integrations, and the path to eventually moving the self-hosted system to a scalable cloud-hybrid architecture. Ensures nothing breaks when the team scales from 10 clients to 1,000.
vp_level.kpi: System uptime %, integration success rate, deploy frequency

vp_level.name: Mark Zuckerberg
vp_level.title: VP of Growth & Data Intelligence
vp_level.focus: Client acquisition funnel, behavioral data on which award routes clients actually book vs. pass on, A/B testing the morning briefing format, and building the referral network to scale the client base aggressively without paid advertising.
vp_level.kpi: Client acquisition cost, referral conversion rate, route acceptance rate per client

vp_level.name: Reed Hastings
vp_level.title: VP of Product
vp_level.focus: Owns the product roadmap. Decides what gets built next based on client usage data, business leverage, and what creates the biggest competitive moat. Ruthlessly deprioritizes low-impact features. Runs weekly sprint reviews.
vp_level.kpi: Feature adoption rate, backlog velocity, client-requested features shipped per month

vp_level.name: Brian Chesky
vp_level.title: VP of Client Partnerships & VIP Services
vp_level.focus: High-touch relationships with top-tier clients. Manages the VIP service layer, custom award search requests, white-glove booking support, and partnership deals with travel agencies and corporate travel managers.
vp_level.kpi: VIP client retention %, custom booking completion rate, partnership revenue

vp_level.name: Jack Dorsey
vp_level.title: VP of Systems Simplicity & Infrastructure Minimalism
vp_level.focus: Actively fights complexity. Every quarter, audits the entire stack and removes anything that does not directly produce client value. Owns the principle that a system with fewer moving parts is more reliable than one with more features. Keeps the architecture lean.
vp_level.kpi: Lines of code removed per quarter, dependency count, mean time to recovery

vp_level.name: Bill Gates
vp_level.title: Principal Inventory Systems Architect
vp_level.focus: Normalizing incoming award availability data, optimizing multi-carrier route caching, and ensuring long-term code integrity for heavy global alliance searches. Owns the database schema and data quality standards.
vp_level.kpi: DB query time, cache hit rate, data integrity score

vp_level.name: Tim Cook
vp_level.title: VP of Transfer Partner & Point Operations
vp_level.focus: Monitoring transfer times across all major issuers, automating transfer-bonus tracking, and minimizing transfer delays for time-sensitive award holds. Owns relationships with Amex, Chase, Capital One, and Citi transfer desks.
vp_level.kpi: Average transfer time, bonus capture rate, transfer failure rate

vp_level.name: Jeff Bezos
vp_level.title: VP of Scraping Infrastructure & Scalability
vp_level.focus: Running the distributed scraping fleet at scale. Minimizing latency, auto-scaling Docker containers during peak award release windows, and maintaining scrapers that stay ahead of airline bot detection systems.
vp_level.kpi: Scrape success rate, pipeline latency (ms), IP ban rate

vp_level.name: Sam Altman
vp_level.title: VP of AI Award Pricing & Strategy
vp_level.focus: Deploying local LLMs to analyze mixed-cabin itineraries, evaluate hidden-city opportunities, and determine maximum point yield. Ensures every EXECUTE/SKIP decision is mathematically grounded and explainable.
vp_level.kpi: Valuation accuracy %, EXECUTE conversion rate, cost per AI inference

vp_level.name: Jensen Huang
vp_level.title: VP of Real-Time Compute & Route Inference
vp_level.focus: GPU-accelerated route matrix computations, vector database searches for complex open-jaw itineraries, and handling thousands of concurrent route calculations per second. Owns all compute hardware decisions.
vp_level.kpi: Matrix compute time (ms), routes/second throughput, GPU utilization %

vp_level.name: Andrew Ng
vp_level.title: Director of Agentic Booking Frameworks
vp_level.focus: Agentic AI systems that navigate airline checkout flows end-to-end — injecting passenger data, holding seats, managing multi-pax splits, and completing bookings without human intervention.
vp_level.kpi: Booking automation success rate, agent error rate, seat-hold conversion %

vp_level.name: Naval Ravikant
vp_level.title: Director of Search Philosophy & Leverage
vp_level.focus: Ensuring maximum value per compute cycle. Audits search trees for redundancy, prunes low-yield queries, and maintains the philosophical framework that keeps the entire system lean and high-leverage.
vp_level.kpi: Search yield per API call, compute cost per discovery, pruning efficiency
